messages.content: 这句话能稍微精简一下吗：We extend our gratitude to all reviewers for their valuable feedback on our paper. Our response is organized into two parts: (i) a summary of common questions and clarifications, and (ii) detailed point-by-point rebuttals to the comments raised by each reviewer.

当然可以。原句比较正式且有些冗长，以下是几种不同程度的精简版本，你可以根据需要的正式程度和篇幅限制来选择：

**版本 1：保留原意但更紧凑（推荐，适合大多数Rebuttal）**
> "We thank all reviewers for their valuable feedback. Our response includes: (i) a summary of common questions, and (ii) point-by-point rebuttals to each reviewer."
> *(改动点：将 "extend our gratitude" 改为 "thank"；去掉了 "organized into two parts" 这种过渡词。)*

**版本 2：更加直接（适合篇幅紧张）**
> "We thank the reviewers for their comments. We provide: (i) common clarifications, and (ii) detailed responses to each reviewer."
> *(改动点：进一步简化了动词和名词。)*

**版本 3：合成一句话（最精简）**
> "We thank the reviewers for their feedback and organize our response into common clarifications followed by point-by-point rebuttals."

**主要修改建议：**
1.  **"We extend our gratitude to..."** $\rightarrow$ **"We thank..."** （意思完全一样，省去三个词）。
2.  **"Our response is organized into two parts"** $\rightarrow$ **"Our response includes"** 或直接用冒号引出，不必特意说明“分为两部分”。
